_doc: Hand-checked equivalence fixture (Task 11). A small engine inventory exercising billing_source + account (routed to cache), plus the plan decisions the ORACLE (Importer) would make for the equivalent snapshot. The offline test asserts EngineReconciler reproduces these counts in PLAN mode. See tests/test_equivalence.py for the target-index injection and the oracle-equivalence reasoning.

inject._doc: Injected target index (bypasses _index_target/network). billing_source: nothing on target. account: number 333 already present (id 900) -> adopt.

expected_engine_counts._doc: Hand-verified oracle plan for the equivalent snapshot (see test docstring). billing_source: Custom BS creates (type custom has an API recreate path), GCP BS skips (no API recreate path). account: Acct A creates into the cache (custom payer resolved via the just-created billing source, no project), Acct C adopts (number 333 already on target), Acct B skips (its GCP payer was skipped so the payer never mapped).
